evals.prompt: 我采取 specs + plan 的方式开发。现在 theme 这块我觉得已经做完了，请你用 Agent Team 的方式做一次验收：看实现是否符合 spec 和 plan，如果发现明确问题就直接修。spec 在 docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-17-theme-design.md，plan 在 docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-19-theme-design.md，代码范围先看 apps/render/src。
evals.expected_output: 应主动采用 Agent Team 结构，分别从 spec、plan、risk 三个角度并行检查，lead 汇总后直接修复明确问题，而不是只停在 review 报告。
expectations: The workflow explicitly compares the implementation against both the spec and the plan, not just one of them.
The workflow uses distinct agent-team roles such as spec reviewer, plan reviewer, risk reviewer, and a lead or fixer role.
When clear issues are found, the workflow continues into direct fixes instead of stopping at a review-only report.
The final answer distinguishes fixed issues from any remaining unresolved items.

evals.prompt: 我这次是按 spec + plan 做的 vault tab persistence。请你像验收一样处理一遍：如果 plan 已完成，就用多 agent 视角帮我判断代码是不是符合设计、实现步骤有没有跑偏、还有没有回归风险。相关文档在 docs/superpowers/specs 和 docs/superpowers/plans 里自己找最匹配的；如果发现明确问题，就直接修。
evals.expected_output: 应能在用户未明确给路径时主动推断最匹配的 spec/plan，说明假设，并在有清晰结论时继续进入修复阶段。
expectations: The workflow infers or selects matching spec/plan documents when the user does not provide exact paths.
The final answer makes the inferred document choice explicit.
The workflow separates source-of-truth gaps from generic code risks before deciding what to fix.
Clear, low-ambiguity issues are repaired instead of being left as a review note.

evals.prompt: 帮我看一下这次 settings 页面的小文案调整。就几个文本改动，不需要太大阵仗；如果有明显问题就顺手修掉。
evals.expected_output: 对于很小的改动，应避免强行启用完整 Agent Team，而是采用轻量 review-and-fix 流程，并说明为什么不需要完整团队分工。
expectations: The workflow avoids forcing a full agent team for a tiny low-risk change.
The response explains why a lightweight review-and-fix flow is sufficient for this scope.
If an obvious issue exists, the workflow prefers directly fixing it.
